entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: Parasitic flowering weeds of the genus Striga that cause substantial losses in sorghum production

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, a crop affected by Striga infestation

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where Striga causes substantial losses in sorghum production

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum cultivars to resist infestation by Striga

entities.name: INTEGRATED STRIGA MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A comprehensive approach to managing Striga, including the use of resistant cultivars

entities.name: AGAR-GEL ASSAY
entities.description: A laboratory tool used to screen host genotypes for low production of striga seed germination stimulants

entities.name: STRIGA SEED GERMINATION STIMULANT
entities.description: A chemical produced by the host plant that triggers Striga seed germination

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating sorghum resistance to Striga in field conditions

entities.name: FIELD INOCULATION
entities.description: The practice of introducing Striga seeds into a field for testing

entities.name: SELECTION INDICES
entities.description: Tools derived from striga counts, vigor, and grain yield to select resistant plants

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the sorghum plant

entities.name: HOST PLANT DAMAGE SCORE
entities.description: A measure of the damage caused to the host plant by Striga

entities.name: MULTI-LOCATIONAL SCREENING
entities.description: Screening across multiple locations to ensure stable performance of resistant materials

entities.name: GENOTYPE-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of the plant and the environment it is grown in

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The transfer and combining of multiple resistance genes into a single cultivar

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide resistance to Striga

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A technique using genetic markers to select for broad-based, polygenic striga resistance

entities.name: POLYGENIC STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to Striga controlled by multiple genes

entities.name: HERBICIDE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of transgenic sorghum to withstand herbicide application

entities.name: HERBICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control Striga
